title: Tangy Moroccan Bananas Fritters
description: A sweet and tangy Moroccan-inspired dessert featuring fried ripe bananas, crunchy on the outside and tender on the inside.
instructions: Heat 2 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F (180°C).
Slice the bananas into 1-inch thick rounds.
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour and cornstarch.
Dip each banana round into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Carefully place the coated banana rounds into the hot oil and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried bananas from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Tangy Moroccan Bananas Fritters warm, sprinkled with a pinch of sugar and a drizzle of honey if desired.
Store any leftover fritters in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days, or freeze for up to 2 months.
